title: Factors affecting intention to adopt Islamic financing: Evidence from Morocco
author: Boubker, Douayri, et al.

steps.title: Method details
steps.instruction: In order to identify the determinants of the intention to adopt Islamic financing among Moroccan micro-business owner-managers, we have opted for a quantitative approach using structural equation modeling under the PLS approach (Fig. 2).Fig. 2Research steps.Fig 2
